level_signals: 4+ years of experience in Sales, Partnerships, or Business Development
OTE range $176K-$220K for SF, consistent with mid-senior IC
Executive relationship management and QBR ownership expectations

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 4+ years of experience in Sales, Partnerships, or Business Development, preferably in the SaaS or developer tooling space.
must_haves.qualifier: preferably in SaaS or developer tooling

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Strong understanding of the developer, modern web, and AI agent ecosystem.
High technical acumen; capable of speaking fluently with both business and technical stakeholders.
A proven relationship-builder with the ability to navigate complex organizations and drive alignment across cross-functional teams.
Strategic thinker who can connect vision to execution and isn't afraid to roll up their sleeves to get things done.
Skilled negotiator with experience owning end-to-end partner deal processes.
Clear, confident communicator with strong executive presence.
Results-driven with a knack for uncovering opportunities and driving value for both Vercel and its partners.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience with partner programs, marketplaces, or ecosystem enablement.
Exposure to AI/ML, devtools, cloud, or SaaS startups.
Relationships with agencies, accelerators, or VC-backed startup communities.

scope.surface: Emerging solution partners portfolio within the Vercel Partnerships team
scope.business_model: B2B SaaS / developer cloud platform with partner-led growth motion
core_responsibilities: Build and execute a one-to-many partner management model across a large portfolio of ecosystem partners
Define and implement annual partner strategies with clear goals, timelines, and milestones
Craft joint go-to-market motions leveraging market trends, product synergies, and whitespace opportunities
Maintain a strong grasp of partner business models, offerings, and strategic objectives
Build and sustain trusted executive-level relationships between Vercel and its partners
Lead internal enablement and external field engagement
Collaborate with marketing to execute co-branded campaigns, events, and content
Manage internal and partner-facing QBRs to evaluate progress and report on KPIs

green_flags: Clear hybrid policy stated (3 days/week in-office)
JD explicitly encourages applicants who don't check every box
Well-known brand (Vercel / Next.js) with high developer mindshare
red_flags: Compensation range stated as OTE but base vs. variable split is not disclosed — actual base unknown
Pay range explicitly applies to SF only; Austin and NYC ranges not stated
Visa sponsorship status not mentioned anywhere in the JD
Role is not fully remote; requires 3-day/week in-office presence at one of three specific cities

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from OTE range and responsibilities)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly listed in JD)
compensation.base_range_usd (not stated; OTE range used for total_comp_estimate_usd instead)
ambiguities: Compensation is listed as OTE ($176K-$220K) but the base/variable split is not disclosed; base_range_usd left null.
The JD says 'preferably in the SaaS or developer tooling space' alongside the 4+ years requirement — treated as a qualifier on a hard requirement rather than a separate soft item.
Visa sponsorship is neither confirmed nor denied; marked as 'unclear'.
